Class Game

java.lang.Object
Game
public class Game extends Object
Serves as the main orchestrator for "Yohane The Parhelion! The Siren in the Mirror World!". Controls state transitions across menus, initializes level layers, sequences entity combat or structural exploration loop tracking, and processes text-based keypad keystroke actions.

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static Scanner
    s
    Shared reader utility scanning string tokens input stream values from standard system consoles.

    Refreshes display lines tracking operational statistics, mapping metadata indexes, and delegates control to paint structural tiles.

    Loops choices allowing the character to transition into physical environments, check collected storage structures, or yield activities.

    Pauses procedural states to write out tabular listings capturing metadata naming parameters for all held item entities currently tracked inside storage.

    Loops a terminal presentation displaying standard introduction sequences, forwarding triggers to configure game models, evaluate status trackers, or terminate.

    Renders a placeholder block notification layout alerting that attribute inspections are still undergoing engineering developments.

  • Field Details

    • s

      public static Scanner s
      Shared reader utility scanning string tokens input stream values from standard system consoles.

  • Method Details

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Entry programmatic hook establishing execution boundaries and forwarding flow controls straight into home menu layouts.
      Parameters:
      args - array parameters passed from external CLI executions

    • displayMainMenu

      public static void displayMainMenu()
      Loops a terminal presentation displaying standard introduction sequences, forwarding triggers to configure game models, evaluate status trackers, or terminate.

    • startGame

      public static void startGame()
      Allocates memory for user references, maps sequence structural boundaries, and sets up the test exploration loop scenario.

    • displayGameMenu

      public static void displayGameMenu(PlayableChar Yohane, Dungeon dungeon)
      Loops choices allowing the character to transition into physical environments, check collected storage structures, or yield activities.
      Parameters:
      Yohane - the user character instance model tracking state parameters
      dungeon - the active complex mapping level configurations

    • displayInventory

      public static void displayInventory(PlayableChar Yohane)
      Pauses procedural states to write out tabular listings capturing metadata naming parameters for all held item entities currently tracked inside storage.
      Parameters:
      Yohane - the user character reference containing target container collections

    • runDungeon

      public static void runDungeon(PlayableChar Yohane, Dungeon dungeon)
      Manages step sequences, user input updates, turn increments, enemy actions, and victory state verifications inside an active floor scenario.
      Parameters:
      Yohane - the player character traversing the dungeon environment
      dungeon - the dungeon container hosting the exploration map levels

    • displayDungeonMenu

      public static void displayDungeonMenu(Dungeon dungeon, int index, PlayableChar Yohane)
      Refreshes display lines tracking operational statistics, mapping metadata indexes, and delegates control to paint structural tiles.
      Parameters:
      dungeon - the map tracking hub database reference
      index - the calculated internal floor lookup pointer
      Yohane - the entity character to render contextually

    • displayDungeonClearScene

      public static void displayDungeonClearScene(Dungeon dungeon)
      Outputs the dialogue for unlocking Hanamaru's shop after saving Hanamaru
      Parameters:
      dungeon - the dungeon cleared

    • displayShop

      public static void displayShop()

    • displayStats

      public static void displayStats(PlayableChar Yohane)

    • displayStatus

      public static void displayStatus()
      Renders a placeholder block notification layout alerting that attribute inspections are still undergoing engineering developments.
